special_mechanics.name: Slide Attack
special_mechanics.description: Batman can slide by pressing A-button and down on D-pad. This move functions as both movement and attack, though it only works against some enemies.

special_mechanics.name: Invincibility Capsules
special_mechanics.description: Collecting eight energy capsules grants Batman invincibility for a few seconds

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative only. No specific movement parameters, gravity values, or jump physics are documented in available sources. Game is described as a run-and-gun platformer with challenging difficulty and fluid sprite animation, but precise physics data is not available.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Batman: Return of the Joker (NES)
Wikipedia - Batman: Return of the Joker
